description_long: This billiard table features a modern, angular design with a striking black and green color scheme. The playing surface is dark gray with a custom blue geometric pattern, and it is populated with multiple colored billiard balls and a cue stick resting along one side. The table's legs are asymmetrical and geometric, with one side in solid green and the other in black, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The pockets are integrated into the corners and sides, appearing as simple round openings without visible nets. The rail cushions are black and blend seamlessly with the table's frame, lacking any visible branding or markings. The felt covering is smooth and unblemished, with no visible chalk or cue ball marks, and the overall condition suggests a new or well-maintained piece.
description: A modern black and green billiard table with a dark gray playing surface, blue geometric pattern, and multiple colored balls. The table features angular legs and integrated pockets, with a smooth, unmarked felt.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green leg on the left, black leg on the right, and the cue stick resting along the top edge.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the open rectangular frame of the legs and the arrangement of balls on the playing surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the green leg on the right, black leg on the left, and the cue stick visible along the back edge.
description_view_3: End view from the green leg side, showing the table's depth and the distribution of balls and pockets.
attribute_pocket_openings: Six round pocket openings are visible, one at each corner and one at the midpoint of each long side. The pockets are open, without visible nets, and appear to be of standard size.
attribute_rail_cushions: The rail cushions are black, integrated into the table's frame, and have a smooth, flat profile with no visible markings, branding, or wear. They appear to be made of rubber or a similar material and are in excellent condition.
attribute_leg_design: The table has two large, angular legs, one green and one black, each forming a geometric frame. The legs are positioned at opposite ends and provide a modern, asymmetrical look with no decorative elements or additional supports.
attribute_felt_covering: The felt covering is dark gray with a custom blue geometric pattern, smooth in texture, and shows no signs of wear, seams, or repairs. It appears to be a high-quality, custom installation in excellent condition.
